name: Anti-uPAR CAR T Cells
summary: Preclinical senolytic cell-therapy strategy using chimeric antigen receptor T cells to target uPAR-positive senescent cells.
aliases: senolytic CAR T cells targeting uPAR
mechanism_summary: Redirects T cells toward uPAR-expressing senescent cells, aiming to clear target cells through immune cytotoxicity and thereby reduce senescence-associated tissue dysfunction.

open_questions: Whether uPAR-positive senescent-cell targeting is safe enough for non-oncology aging contexts
Which tissues and senescent-cell states are appropriate targets without disrupting repair or immune surveillance
Whether CAR T persistence can be tuned to avoid over-clearance, cytokine toxicity, or on-target off-tissue effects
Whether preclinical metabolic and intestinal benefits translate to treated humans
